friction: rAF throttling in hidden tabs blocked automated visual verify of the live transforms
suggestion: document the rAF-throttle gotcha somewhere so future UI verify work uses math replica or foreground tab

friction: pre-commit hook blocked archive due to stale viewer.html reference
suggestion: when copying sod files between repos, update the gate script first to unblock the commit cycle

friction: Peer code review caught a missed requirement (shared nav base not actually extracted) and a scope-gate violation (templates/dust.html and mochi/ not in files list). Both corrected in-flow.
suggestion: On build, diff the spec's shared-primitives list against what actually ended up in the shared file before moving to verify.

friction: Peer code review caught a glyph override that drifted from spec (× on open), plus two small advisories (focus-visible styling, whitespace trim). Easy fixes.
suggestion: When spec pins a specific glyph/character, add a grep-check to the build step so later CSS additions can't override it silently.
